summary: Iteration 31 — retested ONLY the two iteration_30 frontend fixes in Feed.jsx. BOTH FIXES VERIFIED GREEN via Playwright on mobile viewport (390x844) at /feed. (1) Route correction '/services/{id}' → '/service/{id}' in ServicesSheet (line 699): clicking [data-testid^=service-item-] now navigates to /service/{id} (singular) with ZERO 'No routes matched' console warnings, and the ServiceDetail page renders correctly (TEST_zfix_service, $50, 3 أيام). (2) CreatorServiceCard z-index bump z-10 → z-30 (line 265): [data-testid^=dismiss-service-card-] is now clickable WITHOUT force=True — normal Playwright click succeeded and the card was hidden immediately after (is_visible=False). Regression flows also pass: hire-btn-{id} opens services-sheet correctly, order-service-{videoId} inside the card also opens the sheet with 4 items. Both iteration_30 HIGH bugs are resolved; the Creator Service Card feature is now 100% functional end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: iteration_30's two-line fixes are correct and complete. The path-consistency lint rule ('/service/' vs '/services/') mentioned in iteration_30 would still be valuable to prevent recurrence, but not blocking.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 4/4 flows pass (dismiss without force, dismiss hides card, hire-btn opens sheet, service-item navigates to /service/{id} singular with no route warnings, order-service opens sheet)

test_credentials: crm@test.com / testpass123 (not required — /feed is publicly accessible; verified without login)
seed_data_creation: Used existing iteration_30 seed services on crm_tester (TEST_it30_svc_low/high, TEST_zfix_service). No new data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feed.jsx CreatorServiceCard + ServicesSheet flow is fully green. Both iteration_30 HIGH bugs (route mismatch and dismiss z-index) fixed by main agent. Playwright evidence: dismiss click without force=True succeeded on 2 cards, service-item nav resulted in URL /service/629d8c0c-... with no console 'No routes matched' warning, and ServiceDetail page rendered correctly with price/delivery. Regression: hire-btn and order-service both open services-sheet with 4 items. Safe to close the killer-card storyline.
rca of the issue: N/A — this is a verification-only iteration; both fixes work as intended.
